info.title: My App API
info.description: Auto-generated from Hono route definitions + Zod schemas.

get.description:
**Two roles in one route:**

1. **Initiation** – Redirects the browser to Google's consent screen.
2. **Callback** – Google returns `?code=...`. The handler upserts the user,
   links the OAuth account, signs a JWT, sets an HttpOnly session cookie,
   then redirects to `redirectTo` (if valid) or the configured frontend origin.

### `redirectTo` query parameter
Pass an absolute URL on the **same frontend origin** before initiating the flow.
It is stored in a short-lived cookie and honoured after the callback.

schema.description: Absolute URL (same frontend origin) to redirect after login.

parameters.description: Absolute URL (same frontend origin) to redirect after login.
parameters.name: redirectTo

302.description: **Initiation** – redirect to Google. **Callback** – redirect to frontend after login.

schema.description: HttpOnly JWT session cookie (set on callback leg only).

Set-Cookie.description: HttpOnly JWT session cookie (set on callback leg only).

401.description: Google did not return an email address.

403.description: Google auth feature flag is disabled on this deployment.

500.description: Unexpected error during user sync or token signing.

get.description: Reads the JWT from the session cookie, validates it (via upstream middleware), and returns the corresponding user record from the database.

401.description: Missing or invalid session cookie / JWT.

404.description: JWT is valid but the user row no longer exists in the database.

post.description: Clears the session cookie (`path=/`). The client should discard any locally cached user state after calling this.

200.description: Cookie cleared; user is now logged out.

get.description: Returns all tenant records from the shared database.

post.description: Creates a tenant record and reserves a tenant schema name.

get.description: Returns all roles defined for the current tenant.

post.description: Creates a new role within the current tenant.
